steps: Make PCR Master Mix for 100 samples in 15ml Falcon tube.
Add 850ul PCR Water undetermined PCR Water (nuclease free) Contributed by users Catalog #PCPW
Dilute SYBR G 1:100 by adding 3ul SYBR G and 297ul PCR water to a new small tube. Vortex and spin down. SYBR G Contributed by users
Add 250ul of SYBR 1:100 dilution to Falcon tube undetermined SYBR G Contributed by users
Add 100ul of Primer 1: GOH-279-M13 10um to Falcon tube undetermined
Add 100ul of Primer 2: GOH-280-M13 10um to Falcon tube undetermined
Add 1000ul of 5' mix to Falcon tube undetermined
Quick vortex and spin down Falcon tube
Add 23ul of Master Mix to each well of green 96 microplate undetermined
Thaw and spin down plate with extracted DNA samples.
Add 2ul of each extracted DNA sample to corresponding well of new plate with master mix. undetermined
Seal PCR plate with plastic film, spin down
Run plate on BioRad CFX with hsp60 qpcr 25ul 40 cycle program.
creator: Sarah Hessen-Schmidt
